name: Trump Headquarters
subject: re: first year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
re: has Peter answered? |
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

During his first year since being elected, President Trump has worked tirelessly to start delivering on every campaign promise made to the American people.

_Our team wants to know what you think about his performance so far:_ **How would you rate President Trump 's inaugural year in office? ** [GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9d3689077345c31723e816228aaed2e067423c69d111ff3d533862642c71af910e76644af63d949f74888dfe2de8a4e2) [GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9d3689077345c3172c0535450f5e1788fe7106742405cb9b636f0ae120323681461b4ba9d9d573cfedec19121003b7c3) [OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9d3689077345c317d0f69d0ef644eb8f859da56e2d58ec26d5a286d353544d3e673f37924670fef6e03ec8ef393183c3) [OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f3c019ea8edd18d3b8a09ba79c3b6314c972d95cf85850460249bd5084d86e2eb281d4763d109b8a8220c9c25c5b4ffe)
Together, we're DRAINING THE SWAMP and getting things done in Washington, even as we're up against obstructionist liberals trying to bring down our bold America First agenda.

_Your thoughts are important to the President, Peter, and he 's asked his top supporters for input._

So please, take the quick poll by heading here today -> **[Official One Year Approval Poll](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f3c019ea8edd18d3707de82299cc90e7d22532f22b448f50246068eb75971a865adfb253297d78cb9e22bd6df72d1baa)**

Thank you,

Trump Headquarters [TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f3c019ea8edd18d3c5b9704486ecc2a1ba7c1d12564888b73716e48d470565757dcf71650b2b3a74cef669ddee2b95f9)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f3c019ea8edd18d33320ef970855fa15391647d7704ae2364be6c533c063a20ab653ea8d21a9db200e71ce4996d460b8) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f3c019ea8edd18d3580115e236a7f470acbccafeff92674e557e0ceed3db1b6aefbf49ca24a683a37fa47ab1b7d2f0e5) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab01bf2b1940f7113135bf7fec58e6e7081212d8436bac2d7a0c19d41c7740aaf888eb11dbb1a3064c) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846861668cf19ee57c12e19372065d6c969b233de8d2ab12b9b)
---

body:
Only a few hours left to get 30% off your favorite OFFICIAL Trump gear... |
---
| | | | | | |

Peter,

We wanted to be sure you saw this BIG LEAGUE SALE...
**As one of our top supporters, you 've qualified for 30% percent off the ENTIRE Official Trump Store using the code:
GIVING**
Here on Team Trump we love sharing holiday joy with friends and family, so be sure to pass along this email to anyone you know so they can get their hands on the only OFFICIAL Trump merchandise.

_All merchandise purchased on Black Friday is guaranteed to be delivered before the holidays._

**[FOR 30% OFF USE THE CODE: GIVING](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=282e49e284c4853ba251f5982aee414b7e123c17fcf890d6396bc0ff42dd3f008044f29a01ee95b4e241dc16ead8816f)**

name: are-you-in@dscc.org
subject: Doug Jones needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
There's a reason why Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ just reported this race is a dead heat. Now it's up to us to help Doug Jones stay competitive.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171125-AreYouIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team --

One thing is for certain: the Alabama special election is going to come down to the wire.

A Fox News poll has Doug Jones ahead by 8 points -- but another poll shows Roy Moore up by 2.

There's a reason why Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ just reported this race is a "dead heat".

[**Doug Jones is counting on our support to run the strongest campaign possible against Roy Moore. Chip in $1 right now to help us fight for every vote in every single state.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171125-AreYouIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

We've always said it would be tough to win this seat. But Doug Jones is running an extremely competitive campaign against Roy Moore -- and now we've got the poll numbers to prove it.

While it won't be easy to pull off a stunning upset in this Alabama Senate special election, it's important that we fight our hardest to help Doug compete.

[**Pitch in $1 right now to help us fight for every single Senate seat, starting with the Alabama special election.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171125-AreYouIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3b7/2b07114c/cdda09f4/7318b8c3/3526544431/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3b7/2b07114c/cdda09f4/7318b8c2/3526544431/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3b7/2b07114c/cdda09f4/7318b93d/3526544431/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
